mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department(dept_name, parent_id, leader_id, sort_num, status) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{parentId}, #{leaderId}, #{sortNum}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_name, parent_id, leader_id, sort_num, status FROM department WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_num ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, dept_name, parent_id, leader_id, sort_num, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM department WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
